notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Nick Gonzales.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Nick Gonzales.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson singles on a sharp ground ball to shortstop Konnor Griffin. Alec Burleson to 2nd. Alec Burleson advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Konnor Griffin.

notableEvents.label: Henry Davis GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Henry Davis grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Jake Mangum out at 2nd. Henry Davis out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Yorke pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Yorke grounds out, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Lowe doubles (8) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker. Oneil Cruz scores. Throwing error by right fielder Jordan Walker.
